'''Frayne''' was a middle-aged [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] military as a weapons researcher and [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]], during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
In the wake of the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] Frayne was dispatched to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] along with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jyl Somtay]], on a [[Second Mission to Geonosis|mission]] to locate and contain any weapons technology that might remain on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The Republic's goal was to ensure that such technology was never put to use against the Republic. However, Doctor Frayne had her own agenda, since she was actually a freelance operative looking to steal the technology for herself.

She rendered Somtay unconscious with a simple ruse, and then captured the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] who had accompanied them. She set out to escape on her own, but was unprepared for the many traps laid by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]]. Somtay and [[Naj Pandoor]] found Frayne — or at least, her severed head — in a hidden passageway beneath the surface of the planet. They later discovered that a captive female [[Nexu/Legends|nexu]] had killed her, although they managed to escape from the creature, when it was attacked by [[roga]]s.
